title: Al Gore Calls for Fossil Fuel Divestment at Harvard
summary: "On April 7, Al Gore, founder and chair of the Climate Reality Project, spoke at Harvard University about the need to tackle climate change. The first topic he addressed? Fossil fuel divestment."
body: On April 7, Al Gore, founder and chair of the Climate Reality Project , spoke at Harvard University about the need to tackle climate change. The first topic he addressed? Fossil fuel divestment....
